headings.usage: Use for all section titles, hero text, and featured service names. Always strictly center-aligned or dramatically left-aligned.

body.usage: Use for descriptions, pricing, and contact info.

accent.usage: Use for testimonials, 'signature' text, or decorative sub-labels.

usage_rules: Use 'Alabaster' (#FAF9F6) as the main canvas, not pure white.
Text should never be pure black (#000000); use 'Warm Charcoal' (#292524).
Brand accents should be used sparingly (buttons, prices, active states).

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

buttons.primary: bg-stone-800 text-stone-50 hover:bg-stone-700 rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-[1.02]
buttons.secondary: border border-stone-300 text-stone-800 hover:border-stone-800 hover:bg-stone-50 rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: text-stone-600 hover:text-stone-900 underline underline-offset-4 decoration-stone-300 hover:decoration-stone-900 transition-all

cards.service: bg-white p-8 hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-500 group relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b border-stone-300 focus:border-stone-800 rounded-none px-0 py-4 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-stone-400 font-light

rules: Use 'Bento' logic: Mix span-4, span-6, and span-8 items.
Never have 3 identical columns in a row.
Use generous gap-8 or gap-12 on desktop.

entrance.fade_up: opacity-0 translate-y-8 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-8 duration-700 ease-out fill-mode-forwards
entrance.zoom_in: opacity-0 scale-95 animate-in fade-in zoom-in-95 duration-700 ease-out

media.treatment: Images must have a subtle warmth filter (sepia: 5-10%) to match the 'Organic Luxury' theme. All gallery images should have a hover state that reveals the service name.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME: Use the 'Organic Luxury' theme. Think 'Kinfolk Magazine' meets 'High-End Spa'. Minimal, breathing room, serif fonts.
2. IMAGES: The user has provided 6 images (/image1.jpeg to /image6.jpeg). These are the HEROES of the site. Use them prominently in the Gallery section.
3. HERO SECTION: Do NOT use a standard 'Image Right, Text Left'. Try a centered layout with the logo 'CLOR MAISON' huge, overlapping a central image.
4. CONTACT: Keep it simple. WhatsApp button is crucial for this business type.
5. FOOTER: Minimalist. 'CLOR MAISON' in large serif font at the bottom.
6. SHADOWS: Use soft, diffused shadows. No harsh black shadows.
7. ANIMATION: Use 'framer-motion' for scroll reveals. Text should slide up gently.
8. RESPONSIVE: Ensure the grid collapses beautifully to 1 column on mobile.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients unless specified.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
